basic_details.job_title: SFIO – Junior Consultants and Young Professionals – 69 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) Recruitment 2026 for 69 posts of Junior Consultants and Young Professionals. Candidates with CA/ICWA/MBA, LLB, PhD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SFIO official website sfio.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age of 65 years for retired government employees.

qualification.education_qualification: Law Graduate, Advocate, CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance), PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant field.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SFIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: SFIO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 69 Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Posts
